ddls:
CREATE TABLE "search_queries" (
  "query_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each search query */,
  "keyword" TEXT /* Keyword or phrase searched */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Average monthly search volume */,
  "difficulty" INTEGER /* Keyword difficulty score */,
  "cpc" REAL /* Cost-per-click (USD) */,
  "competitive_density" REAL /* Competitive density of the search query */,
  "num_results" INTEGER /* Number of results for the search query */,
  "intent" TEXT /* Intent behind the search query (e.g., informational, navigational, transactional) */,
  "query_type" TEXT /* Type of search query (e.g., organic, paid) */,
  "search_engine" TEXT /* Search engine used (e.g., Google, Bing) */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Device type used (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the search (e.g., country, city) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("query_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_search_queries_search_engine FOREIGN KEY ("search_engine") REFERENCES search_engines ("engine_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "serp_features" (
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each SERP feature */,
  "query_id" INTEGER /* ID of the search query the feature belongs to */,
  "feature_name" TEXT /* Name of the SERP feature (e.g., featured snippet, people also ask, reviews) */,
  "feature_description" TEXT /* Description of the SERP feature */,
  "feature_position" INTEGER /* Position of the feature on the SERP */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feature_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_serp_features_query_id FOREIGN KEY ("query_id") REFERENCES search_queries ("query_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trend data point */,
  "query_id" INTEGER /* ID of the search query the trend data belongs to */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the trend data */,
  "month" INTEGER /* Month of the trend data */,
  "value" REAL /* Trend value for the given year and month */,
  "trend_type" TEXT /* Type of trend (e.g., increasing, decreasing, stable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trends_query_id FOREIGN KEY ("query_id") REFERENCES search_queries ("query_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., coach, player, enthusiast) */,
  "team" TEXT /* Team the user is associated with */,
  "league" TEXT /* League the user is associated with */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "query_id" INTEGER /* ID of the search query being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the search query */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the search query was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_device" TEXT /* Device used to access the search query (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_query_id FOREIGN KEY ("query_id") REFERENCES search_queries ("query_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "query_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "query_id" INTEGER /* ID of the search query the category belongs to */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category (e.g., basketball rules, player stats) */,
  "category_description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_query_categories_query_id FOREIGN KEY ("query_id") REFERENCES search_queries ("query_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "query_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "query_id" INTEGER /* ID of the search query the tag belongs to */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag (e.g., jump ball, air ball) */,
  "tag_description" TEXT /* Description of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_query_tags_query_id FOREIGN KEY ("query_id") REFERENCES search_queries ("query_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "search_engines" (
  "engine_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each search engine */,
  "engine_name" TEXT /* Name of the search engine (e.g., Google, Bing) */,
  "engine_description" TEXT /* Description of the search engine */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("engine_id")
)
